# Pull Request

## What does this change?

<!-- Short summary of the change and the motivation. Link related issues: Fixes #123 -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor / cleanup
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] CI / build / deployment

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run lint` and `npm run build` pass in the affected package(s)
- [ ] Backend changes: `npm test` passes and the 90% line-coverage gate stays green
- [ ] New behavior is covered by tests
- [ ] Documentation updated where this change makes it stale (READMEs, `docs/api.md`, `.env.example`, `CHANGELOG.md`)
- [ ] Breaking changes are called out below and in `CHANGELOG.md`

<sub>🤖 On this PR, CI posts a **coverage report** comment, and (once
`PREVIEW_ENABLED=true`) a **live preview URL** on its own 0%-traffic revision.
The preview is torn down automatically when this PR is merged or closed.</sub>
